all.en: This notice confirms that our ISO certification renewal audit is now scheduled.
all.zh: 本通知確認我方 ISO 認證續證稽核已正式排定。

all.en: External auditors will visit the main facility from June third through June seventh.
all.zh: 外部稽核員將自六月三日至六月七日蒅訪主要廠區。

all.en: The scope covers quality management standards across manufacturing and logistics.
all.zh: 稽核範圍涵蓋製造與物流的品質管理標準。

all.en: All department leaders are expected to prepare relevant process documentation.
all.zh: 所有部門主管應準備相關流程文件以備查核。

all.en: Procedure manuals must reflect the latest revisions implemented this year.
all.zh: 作業手冊須反映本年度導入的最新修訂內容。

all.en: Internal audit findings from January and March should be fully closed by then.
all.zh: 一月與三月內部稽核發現事項應於該時前完全結案。

all.en: Corrective action records require evidence of root cause analysis and follow up.
all.zh: 矯正措施紀錄需有根本原因分析與後續追蹤佐證。

all.en: Calibration certificates for measurement equipment must remain valid and accessible.
all.zh: 量測設備校驗證書須維持有效並可隨時調閱。

all.en: Training records for new operators should be updated within the digital system.
all.zh: 新進操作人員的訓練紀錄應於電子系統中更新。

all.en: Supplier qualification files will be reviewed for high risk material categories.
all.zh: 高風險物料類別的供應商評鑑檔案將接受審閱。

all.en: Customer complaint logs and response records will also be examined in detail.
all.zh: 客戶投訴紀錄與回應檔案亦將被詳細檢視。

all.en: Management review meeting minutes from the past twelve months are required.
all.zh: 過去十二個月的管理審查會議紀錄亦為必要文件。

all.en: The opening meeting is scheduled for nine in the morning on the first audit day.
all.zh: 開場會議排定於稽核首日上午九點舉行。

all.en: Department interviews will follow throughout the week according to a fixed agenda.
all.zh: 部門訪談將於整週依固定議程進行。

all.en: Interviewees should answer questions clearly and reference documented procedures.
all.zh: 受訪者應清楚回答問題並引用書面程序內容。

all.en: Sample testing may occur on the production floor during regular shift hours.
all.zh: 取樣測試可能於正常班別時段在生產現場執行。

all.en: Please ensure work areas remain clean and safety signage is properly displayed.
all.zh: 請確保工作區整潔，且安全標示妥善張貼。

all.en: The closing meeting will summarize observations and any minor or major findings.
all.zh: 閉場會議將彙整觀察事項及任何輕微或重大發現。

all.en: Final certification reports are expected within three weeks after the visit.
all.zh: 最終認證報告預計於蒅訪後三週內提供。

all.en: Any nonconformities must be addressed through a formal corrective action plan.
all.zh: 任何不符合事項須透過正式矯正措施計畫處理。

all.en: Successful renewal extends our certification status for another three year cycle.
all.zh: 順利續證將使我方認證狀態再延長一個三年週期。

all.en: This achievement supports our reputation with global customers and partners.
all.zh: 此項成就有助於提升我方在全球客戶與夥伴間的信譽。

all.en: Please direct questions to the quality assurance office before the audit begins.
all.zh: 如有疑問，請於稽核開始前洽詢品質保證辦公室。

all.en: Thank you for your continued dedication to operational excellence and compliance.
all.zh: 感謝您持續致力於營運卓越與合規。
